# Thoughtful Design & Exceptional Build, for Historic & Vintage Projects

Since 1997 Arciform has specialized in the restoration and remodeling of Portland and Oregon's architectural heritage. Our collaborative design-build approach ensures

- a deep understanding of our client’s goals and our architectural history,
- well-communicated decisions
- and excellence in execution.

Our philosophy is simple – We want to help preserve our architectural heritage while weaving in the unique stories of our clients - making the process of design and build a creative and rewarding journey.

[LEARN ABOUT OUR DESIGN-BUILD APPROACH](https://www.arciform.com/design)

## Design-build with respect for people and places

From a landmark restoration to a family home renovation and remodel, we honor each project's architectural integrity while weaving in our clients’ goals to update their structures for today’s lifestyle.

Why Arciform?

Because when we win together,

we win for generations.

Why Arciform? Because when we win together, we win for generations.

## Why Arciform?

## Because when we win together,

## we win for generations.

At Arciform, we create spaces that stand the test of time. Our integrated team ensures a seamless experience from concept to completion. When you choose us as your design-build partner, your investment thrives for generations through our commitment to exceptional craftsmanship, sustainable practices, community-focused sourcing, and meaningful connections that turn clients into lifelong friends.

﻿

At Arciform, we create spaces that stand the test of time. Our integrated team ensures a seamless experience from concept to completion. When you choose us as your design-build partner, your investment thrives for generations through our commitment to exceptional craftsmanship, sustainable practices, community-focused sourcing, and meaningful connections that turn clients into lifelong friends.

## Built on Relationships

Your story and vision guide us. With attentive listening and open communication, our team ensures an experience as rewarding as the spaces we create together.

[EXPLORE OUR DESIGN-BUILD PROCESS](https://www.arciform.com/design)

## Portland's Remodeling Experts

Our design-build team delivers excellence at every step, providing outstanding results for every historic home or building remodel. In our woodshop, our carpenters recreate orrestore historically accurate windows and doors and build bespoke cabinetry.

[MEET THE TEAM](https://www.arciform.com/about/team)

## Portland's Remodeling Experts

Our design-build team delivers excellence at every step, providing outstanding results for every historic home or building remodel. In our woodshop, our carpenters recreate or restore historically accurate windows and doors and build bespoke cabinetry.

[MEET THE TEAM](https://www.arciform.com/about/team)

## Portland's Remodeling Experts

Our design-build team delivers excellence at every step, providing outstanding results for every historic home or building remodel. In our woodshop, our carpenters recreate or restore historically accurate windows and doors and build bespoke cabinetry.

[MEET THE TEAM](https://www.arciform.com/about/team)

## Quality Materials, Enduring Value

We prioritize local sourcing. We support Pacific Northwest economies by selecting premium, regionally crafted materials, like Portland-made lighting and regional wood and tile, combining practical value with community investment.

[MEET OUR COMMUNITY PARTNERS](https://www.arciform.com/about/associations)

## Quality Materials, Enduring Value

We prioritize local sourcing. We support Pacific Northwest economies by selecting premium, regionally crafted materials, like Portland-made lighting and regional wood and tile, combining practical value with community investment.

**“It’s about passion for the work but it’s also about results. We set goals, realistic goals, and we go achieve them, then we set the next set of goals and achieve them. You’ve got to stay behind your word and you’ve got to exceed clients’ expectations.”**

ANNE DEWOLF - OWNER

“It’s about passion for the work but it’s also about results. We set goals, realistic goals, and we go achieve them, then we set the next set of goals and achieve them. You’ve got to stay behind your word and you’ve got to exceed clients’ expectations.”

ANNE DEWOLF - OWNER

Reserve your complimentary design consultation with our remodeling experts and let's discover the many opportunities.

## Emily Henderson: The Farmhouse Journey

When designer and Instagram influencer Emily Henderson found a vintage farmhouse 15 minutes from Downtown Portland she just knew it was meant to be – and, she also knew she would need help tackling the renovation.

[FOLLOW THE STORY](https://www.arciform.com/working-with-emily-henderson)

metadata.keywords: portland design build, home renovation, historic restoration
metadata.twitter:title: Arciform | Portland's Premier Design Build & Historic Renovation Firm
metadata.og:description: Arciform is a design build firm in Portland, Oregon that has been renovating historic homes, landmarks, and commercial buildings in the Pacific Northwest since 1997. Arciform specializes in reimagining historic spaces, revolutionizing layouts to adapt to 21st-century lifestyles while preserving architectural heritage.

Arciform specializes in reimagining historic spaces, revolutionizing layouts to adapt to 21st-century lifestyles while preserving architectural heritage.
